shows.title: Protecting Financial Assets / Deadly Space Impact
shows.first_half: First Half: Economist Catherine Austin Fitts will offer steps we can take to protect our freedom and our assets. She'll examine programmable money that creates a level of surveillance and financial interference, controlling our movements, our financial transactions, and our children.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Author George Mitrovic will discuss the hidden history of planet Earth. He'll explore information about a massive comet that crashed into what is now the Atlantic Ocean around 10,900 BC. The comet shattered into massive fragments that rained down, causing the extinction of the woolly mammoth.

shows.title: Understanding Aliens / Palmistry Secrets
shows.first_half: First Half: Author Whitley Strieber will discuss transformation, contact with "the visitors," and how to understand these beings from other planets. He'll also talk about the recent pattern of missing scientists and the possibility that the cases may be connected.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Palmist Vernon Mahabal will explore the economic and social trends he sees for this year and the next. He'll share how to become more aware of our spiritual nature while pursuing our material responsibilities, and he'll also explain how we can connect to our inner intuitive powers through the agency of our own palms.

shows.title: Ufology Update / Open Lines
shows.first_half: Guest host Rich Berra (email) will speak with ufologist Danny Silva about the current state of ufology. Silva will share his observations and opinions on the government's recent release of UFO files. He'll tell us when he thinks we can expect more, what new files might contain, and if the quality of the information will improve. Silva will also discuss Steven Spielberg's new sci-fi thriller Disclosure Day. Followed by Open Lines in the latter half—give Rich a call and discuss whatever's on your mind!
